_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Path parameter renamed dep_id → dep_issue_id (loom vocabulary at the URL level). Response shape unchanged from classic ({removed: bool}). Idempotent: removing a non-existent dependency between two valid-prefix ids returns 200 {removed: false}, not 404 — wire-compatible behaviour shared with classic.

shape_decl.rationale: Boolean status response. Path uses dep_issue_id since the path parameter denotes another issue's primary key. Idempotent semantics inherited from db.remove_dependency().

examples.name: success_idempotent_no_dep
examples.note: Removing a non-existent dependency between two valid-prefix ids returns 200 with removed=false. This is the only fixture-replayable case (the populated success path requires seeded issues + a real dependency); see the seeded full-lifecycle test for that.
